title: Cozy Days
description: The last vanilla+ modpack you'll ever need!
body:
A collection of mods I personally enjoyed from a few different modpacks; namely Better Adventures, Vanilla Perfected. And also of course removing the ones I deemed unnecessary.

All credit to the creators of these packs and the mods in them. Disclaimer: I take no credit for any of the mods in this pack, I merely collated them into one playable bundle for the best possible vanilla+ experience. Please support the original creators!

All my favorite mods! Notably: AdventureZ & TieredZ for that extra fun added onto vanilla mechanics, a bunch of terrain generation mods like Tectonic and Geophillic, added structures from Dungeons and Taverns as well as Terralith, some core optimisation mods of course, a bunch of mods + resource packs that give mobs and items a 3D look and feel, and small quality-of-life addons like new sounds ingame and in the UI and small in-game improvements which make it less grindy and more enjoyable overall! Hope you like it :)
